raw_data: fractalego/personal-speech-to-text-model is a fine-tuned version of wav2vec2-large-xlsr-53. It was specifically optimized for individual voice profiles and noisy environments. Total parameters: 315M. It uses the Apache 2.0 license. The model shows significant improvements in Word Error Rate (WER) for personalized datasets compared to general-purpose models.

The nemocurator-speech-bandwidth-filter is a utility model for speech data curation. It is a lightweight Scikit-learn Random Forest classifier (0.14 MB) used to detect high-quality speech samples for training larger models. Distributed under NVIDIA Community and Apache 2.0. Key tool for bandwidth-based filtering in NeMo Curator pipelines.

Fish Speech 1.5 is a leading-edge Text-to-Speech model featuring a Dual AR architecture. It has been trained on over 1 million hours of multi-lingual audio data, supporting 13 languages including English, Chinese, Japanese, and more. The model size is approximately 1.47 GB and it utilizes a Firefly GAN based vocoder for high-fidelity output. License: CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0. It aims to bridge the gap between human and machine speech quality.

NVIDIA's Nemotron-Speech-Streaming-En-0.6b is a 600M parameter Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model. It is built on the Cache-Aware FastConformer-RNNT architecture, optimized for low-latency real-time streaming. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on LibriSpeech. The model is released under the NVIDIA Open Model License. Supports various chunk sizes from 80ms to 1120ms.

ShigrafS/hindi_text_to_speech is a specialized fine-tuned version of the SpeechT5 architecture for high-quality Hindi synthesis. It employs a unified encoder-decoder transformer to map Hindi text embeddings to mel-spectrograms. Model size: 578 MB (safetensors). Trained on curated Indic datasets to ensure natural pronunciation and localized prosody for Hindi speakers.
